testcase.name: shouldExposeActuatorHealthEndpoint
testcase.system-out:
15:40:41.750 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.nhom1.inventory_service.InventoryServiceApplicationTests$IntegrationPlatform]: IntegrationPlatform does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 15:40:42.915 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.nhom1.inventory_service.InventoryServiceApplication for test class com.nhom1.inventory_service.InventoryServiceApplicationTests$IntegrationPlatform
2026-03-22T15:40:48.414+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] viceApplicationTests$IntegrationPlatform : Starting InventoryServiceApplicationTests.IntegrationPlatform using Java 21.0.8 with PID 1812 (started by Admin in D:\CCNLTHD\Practice\BT4\Baitap-Microservices\inventory_service) 2026-03-22T15:40:48.556+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] viceApplicationTests$IntegrationPlatform : The following 1 profile is active: "test" 2026-03-22T15:40:54.847+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] .s.d.r.c.RepositoryConfigurationDelegate : Bootstrapping Spring Data JPA repositories in DEFAULT mode. 2026-03-22T15:40:55.471+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] .s.d.r.c.RepositoryConfigurationDelegate : Finished Spring Data repository scanning in 601 ms. Found 1 JPA repository interface. 2026-03-22T15:40:56.422+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] o.s.cloud.context.scope.GenericScope : BeanFactory id=34077809-e9a1-329d-bbe4-96ae44c3a8a1 2026-03-22T15:40:57.819+07:00 WARN 1812 --- [ main] [ ] trationDelegate$BeanPostProcessorChecker : Bean 'org.springframework.cloud.client.loadbalancer.LoadBalancerAutoConfiguration$DeferringLoadBalancerInterceptorConfig' of type [org.springframework.cloud.client.loadbalancer.LoadBalancerAutoConfiguration$DeferringLoadBalancerInterceptorConfig] is not eligible for getting processed by all BeanPostProcessors (for example: not eligible for auto-proxying). The currently created BeanPostProcessor [lbRestClientPostProcessor] is declared through a non-static factory method on that class; consider declaring it as static instead. 2026-03-22T15:40:57.850+07:00 WARN 1812 --- [ main] [ ] trationDelegate$BeanPostProcessorChecker : Bean 'deferringLoadBalancerInterceptor' of type [org.springframework.cloud.client.loadbalancer.DeferringLoadBalancerInterceptor] is not eligible for getting processed by all BeanPostProcessors (for example: not eligible for auto-proxying). Is this bean getting eagerly injected/applied to a currently created BeanPostProcessor [lbRestClientPostProcessor]? Check the corresponding BeanPostProcessor declaration and its dependencies/advisors. If this bean does not have to be post-processed, declare it with ROLE_INFRASTRUCTURE. 2026-03-22T15:40:58.760+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] o.hibernate.jpa.internal.util.LogHelper : HHH000204: Processing PersistenceUnitInfo [name: default] 2026-03-22T15:40:59.019+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] org.hibernate.Version : HHH000412: Hibernate ORM core version 6.5.3.Final 2026-03-22T15:40:59.184+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] o.h.c.internal.RegionFactoryInitiator : HHH000026: Second-level cache disabled 2026-03-22T15:41:01.570+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] o.s.o.j.p.SpringPersistenceUnitInfo : No LoadTimeWeaver setup: ignoring JPA class transformer 2026-03-22T15:41:01.797+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Starting... 2026-03-22T15:41:03.931+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool : HikariPool-1 - Added connection conn0: url=jdbc:h2:mem:inventorydb user=SA 2026-03-22T15:41:03.942+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Start completed. 2026-03-22T15:41:04.096+07:00 WARN 1812 --- [ main] [ ] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: H2Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-03-22T15:41:08.501+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) 2026-03-22T15:41:08.670+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-03-22T15:41:10.948+07:00 WARN 1812 --- [ main] [ ] JpaBaseConfiguration$JpaWebConfiguration : spring.jpa.open-in-view is enabled by default. Therefore, database queries may be performed during view rendering. Explicitly configure spring.jpa.open-in-view to disable this warning 2026-03-22T15:41:15.626+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] o.s.b.t.m.w.SpringBootMockServletContext : Initializing Spring TestDispatcherServlet '' 2026-03-22T15:41:15.627+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Initializing Servlet '' 2026-03-22T15:41:15.807+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] o.s.b.a.e.web.EndpointLinksResolver : Exposing 1 endpoint beneath base path '/actuator' 2026-03-22T15:41:16.059+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Completed initialization in 429 ms 2026-03-22T15:41:16.558+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] DiscoveryClientOptionalArgsConfiguration : Eureka HTTP Client uses RestTemplate. 2026-03-22T15:41:16.836+07:00 WARN 1812 --- [ main] [ ] iguration$LoadBalancerCaffeineWarnLogger : Spring Cloud LoadBalancer is currently working with the default cache. While this cache implementation is useful for development and tests, it's recommended to use Caffeine cache in production.You can switch to using Caffeine cache, by adding it and org.springframework.cache.caffeine.CaffeineCacheManager to the classpath. 2026-03-22T15:41:17.082+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] viceApplicationTests$IntegrationPlatform : Started InventoryServiceApplicationTests.IntegrationPlatform in 32.736 seconds (process running for 42.61)
testcase.system-err: WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\Admin\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.14.19\byte-buddy-agent-1.14.19.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

skipped.message: Requires running Zipkin backend to assert traces
Requires docker compose environment in integration pipeline
Temporarily skipped by QA decision: Prometheus endpoint not required in current phase
Requires a running Eureka server to verify runtime registration
